rows.label: tev016102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Our project to build a large-scale
water-purification plant here on
Mira is finally underway![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016102_MSG0002
rows.name:
As team leader, I had intended
to manage the project myself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016102_MSG0003
rows.name:
But I've decided to put Ajoa in charge,
as it was her efforts more than anyone's
that led us to this point.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016102_MSG0004
rows.name:
I know she's had her share of difficulties with
the project, but I'm confident that if there
are solutions to be found, she'll find them.[ST:wait ]
